spec_match.rationale: Uses beforetoggle as the animation entry hook and toggle as the resolution hook on <dialog> — the canonical replacement for the mutation-observer dance.

interactive.rationale: Open/close button with transition class applied; real animation visible.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a beforetoggle-driven animation hook with @starting-style; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo now includes an old-way MutationObserver baseline and a stress button that rapidly opens, closes, and reopens the dialog while logging event ordering.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, transitions use design system tokens.

summary: Verified in chrome-devtools-mcp with Headless Chrome Canary 151 on 2026-06-06: loaded /v131/dialog-toggle-events/animation-hook/, switched to the old-way MutationObserver baseline, opened and closed the dialog and observed mutation rows alongside beforetoggle/toggle rows, switched back to the modern path, clicked the stress open/close/open control, confirmed the event timeline ended with the dialog open and close/show buttons in the correct disabled states, confirmed the ChromeStatus link, and found a clean console with no failed requests.
